title: Infrastructure (Containers)
description: Per-container CPU and memory from cAdvisor. This standalone cAdvisor DaemonSet has no containerd socket access, so it only sees raw cgroup paths with no image/name/label enrichment at all - filtering on those labels matches nothing. Instead filtered on id matching the leaf per-container cgroup (.../cri-containerd-<id>.scope), which excludes the aggregate pod/QoS/host slices (e.g. /kubepods.slice, /system.slice) that would otherwise dominate the totals.
